name: YOUSAF-MD
description: YOUSAF-MD WhatsApp Bot by Muhammad Yousaf Baloch

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Aapka WhatsApp number (country code ke sath)

ANTI_DELETE.description: Deleted messages wapas bheje — true ya false

AUTO_STATUS_VIEW.description: Status auto view kare — true ya false

AUTO_LIKE_STATUS.description: Status pe auto like kare — true ya false

ANTI_CALL.description: Calls auto reject kare — true ya false

ANTI_LINK.description: Group mein links delete kare — true ya false

WELCOME_MSG.description: Naye member ko welcome message — true ya false

GOODBYE_MSG.description: Jane wale ko goodbye message — true ya false

AUTO_REACT.description: Messages pe auto react kare — true ya false
